violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Prep cooler with meat options temping above 41*F. Ranging 42.2*F-47.6*F. Should dial meat cooler to a colder temp then monitor/maintain temperature. Closing lid when not serving customers is important. Maintenance may be needed if cooler cannot keep proper temperatures. Vegetable prep cooler was fine. - Tuna mix was highest at 58.6*F. Staff stated the tuna was made less than an hour earlier and placed in prep cooler right after mixing. Putting freshly made tuna mix in walk-in cooler until 41*f or below can be beneficial before adding to prep cooler.
